name: The Untrusting Angel | Giantess Kirifuji Nagisa
description:
Bringing that angel with that sweet angelic voice in JP. To a theater near you. Mind her original appearance in the story. We all know how she acted, but I still forgive her.

Sensei is honestly a better person than me. Lol.

She is over 18 in this bot.
